legend: The Brahan Seer (Coinneach Odhar) & Kenneth Mackenzie

sites.name: Brahan Seer Monument, Chanonry Point
sites.description: Memorial stone marking the traditional execution site, with dolphin watching opportunities
sites.visitor_info: Free access, best dolphin viewing 1 hour after low tide

sites.name: Fortrose Cathedral
sites.description: Historic cathedral ruins in the Seer's homeland

sites.name: Brahan Castle Site
sites.description: Former seat of the Earls of Seaforth, now ruins
